examples.text: Suddenly, those five fingers transformed into a mountain range, which flipped and pinned Sun Wukong to the ground. Using a sacred seal, the Buddha secured the prison, trapping the Monkey King for good— unless he could learn to change. Seeing the mystical tag, Sun Wukong knew he couldn’t escape unaided.

source.text: The tale of the Monkey King and the Buddha - Ji Hao
